baby brain too small

I'm rereading arc 2 since I tried to speedrun it to get the anniv rewards on clearing arc 2chapter 4, so|| is my understanding correct  like Clementine baited alot of people with alot of tremendous mental stress to her therapy sessions to turn them into the hivemind? Like is that still in Gdoll's world or this is another distinct world||
and is it also safe to assume that G-Doll || number 67 || is friendly to the keeper?
i wonder how many GDoll bodies would wake up as the story goes on || and  becomes crazy like GDoll #68 ||
hearing that most of arc 2 was recycled content explains a lot of story stuff actually
also interesting to hear that the profits were carried by the anniversary

maybe just my story gamer bias but i can't help but feel like most of the arc 2 stories had too little oppurtunity to spend time with the characters as the keeper and it made it hard to get attached to them and thus want to pull...

like most of the awakeners feel like random people who join your squad but don't really have a relationship with (or you do, but there's no story content showing it), as opposed to doresain or clem who you get to bond with

i think the lack of new special ops contribute to it as well. Psyche Deepdives are not personal to keeper since theyre more of a witness than an actual participant. with a few exceptions, keeper cant change the events of deepdives
special ops meanwhile puts keeper themselves as part of the plot, and allows the game to show personal interactions with the awakener without the "they think theyre talking to someone else" part
i understand special ops take more resources to create though, since deepdives are more of short stories
mouchette should have been classified as a special op instead of a dreamscape
I think hers might have been a dreamscape so it could be put with the other crossover event in the uhh, whatever you call that organization tab thing I forget off the top of my head
I just woke up, but yeah, not being able to really interact with the characters is sometimes a hindrance to getting to get attached to arc 2 characters

it probably also depends on your personal taste too, like if a character really stands out to you you'll want to get them either way, but if they don't, without that ability to see how the keeper interacts with them it can definitely be difficult to feel a desire to get newer awakeners
(obligatory "I just woke up so if any of my wording is confusing or not making sense feel free to ignore everything I'm saying")
I mean, I see Clem and GDoll and immediately thought I could fix them
The way they adapt the Ghoul King to Doresain is also chef's kiss
But it could just be my personal preference

no yeah, definitely
on my end i got super attached to castor and pollux bc the tragedy of their narrative got me

which arc 2 awakeners you get attached to really is just a matter of personal taste, and some people will have an easier time getting attached to them if we get to have the keeper actually interact with the various awakeners, is all
i agree with everyone ngl but i also want to add that i think the fact that arc 1 mostly had two chapter arcs/connections also helped
honestly it made me really love jenkin a lot because the amount of time spent with her really helped her own character arc shape out and feel more emotional by the end
yeah
i feel like chapter 2-3-4 arc 2 are glorified special ops lol
I still enjoy them but not as much as I like chapter 5-6 of arc 1
i completely agree
which kinda feels bad a little because they introduced really cool concepts that i think could go so hard if they had the chance to flesh them out more
also kinda sad that we will get back to year 1 ratio this year
Dont even get me started
but hey I actually think every male units they release are neat
im really upset about that
so as long as they still get me hook
(and pls release fcking Karnahk)
all the N side chicks are here
where tf are you

generally ive liked most characters they release so its not As upsetting as other gachas but i always felt morimens was on the up for not being like other gachas and having 1:1 until gmurphy

i dont need a 1:1 because ive played many gachas in my time so i know what to expect but id like it not to be 2-3 times a year
i'll forgive them if they give me playable albino though that could feed me for a while

content: me after reading Xu chat
I think part of the reason the chapters in act 2 feel less is the lack of exploration mechanic tbh
I actually really liked the story in chapter 4 with Gmurphy, the desperation of her wanting Miryam to love her in a way she just is not capable of was really sad
But everything feels so fast since you never have those exploration downtimes you had in arc 1
